name: KCell JSC
notes: Kcell JSC is a leading mobile operator in Kazakhstan, operating under the brands Kcell and Activ. The company provides voice and packet data services across 2G, 3G, 4G, 5G, and FWA (Fixed Wireless Access) technologies. We have a selective peering policy that requires a minimum of 500 Mbps to ensure optimal quality for both our users and your content. Our company’s strategy is focused on continually enhancing the service quality for mobile users, aiming to deliver superior user experiences.
